description: FlexNetOS meta hooks for Codex plugin sessions

hooks.command: rtk bash -lc 'd=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ "$d" != / ]; do [ -f "$d/.meta.yaml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta.yml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta" ] && break; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ "$d" != / ] || exit 0; cd "$d" && rtk meta context >/dev/null 2>/dev/null || true'

rtk bash -lc 'd=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ "$d" != / ]; do [ -f "$d/.meta.yaml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta.yml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta" ] && break; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ "$d" != / ] || exit 0; [ -x "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" ] || exit 0; exec "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" guard'

rtk bash -lc 'd=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ "$d" != / ]; do [ -f "$d/.meta.yaml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta.yml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta" ] && break; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ "$d" != / ] || exit 0; [ -x "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" ] || exit 0; exec "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" codex stop'

rtk bash -lc 'd=${META_ROOT:-$PWD}; while [ "$d" != / ]; do [ -f "$d/.meta.yaml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta.yml" ] || [ -f "$d/.meta" ] && break; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ "$d" != / ] || exit 0; [ -x "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" ] || exit 0; exec "$d/agent/target/debug/agent" codex stop'
